title: N HAIR SETUP Tool
description: N HAIR SETUP Tool is a technical utility for Maya that automates and standardizes dynamic curve simulations in production. It replaces tedious, error-prone manual node construction with a deterministic, pipeline-compliant setup, enforcing strict naming conventions and predictable node architecture. By ensuring stable connections and eliminating structural inconsistencies, it improves efficiency, simulation stability, and scalability—allowing reliable, repeatable setups across shots, assets, and large-scale productions while enhancing overall CFX workflow quality.

title: Search And BlendShape For Curves Tool
description: Search And BlendShape For Curves enables fast automatic curve matching. You can define a maximum world-space search radius for the first CV (Base CV) of target curves relative to base curves. The tool uses this threshold to automatically pair curves and generate the corresponding BlendShapes.

title: Reset Curves Tool
description: A production-oriented tool for safely resetting curve states in complex scenes.

title: CFX SHOWREEL | 2024 Updated
description: Selected CFX shots from feature films (2016–2024). Responsible for CFX setup and simulation, including interacting props and environment elements.

title: CFX Setup for Feature Film
description: A selection of CFX setups I created for main characters in feature films (2016–2024), designed using the Maya Nucleus system to ensure stable simulations and reliable results even during fast character movements, making them fully suitable for feature film production.

title: 2022 CFX Showreel | Stromae – Multitude, le film – The Concert

title: RIGGING DEMO REEL 2015 N01
description: The character rigging setup was created manually in 2015. The rig was designed to provide intuitive controls and stable deformation for expressive character animation. If you would like to check the Maya file, you can download it here.

title: N CLOTH SETUP Demo Beginning
description: In addition, you can select different numbers of Base and Target curves. For example, if you select 5 Base curvesand 10 Target curves, the tool will automatically find, for each Base curve, the closest curve among the 10 Targetcurves as its match. Conversely, it can also handle cases where the number of Base curves exceeds the numberof Target curves, intelligently performing the matching.If the Base and Target curves have inconsistent topology and the BlendShape cannot be created, you can enablethe “Rebuild Curve” topology option to force the tool to reconstruct the target curves, ensuring successfulBlendShape creation.
